---
name: Delivery Issue Template
about: For Delivery Team members to define and track work items
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Feature

---

#### **1. Summary**
*One-sentence description of the work. Link to external request if applicable.*



#### **2. Business Context**
*Why does this matter?*



#### **3. User Impact**
- **User Stories:** *(only if user-facing)*
  - *"As a [role], I want [action] so that [benefit]."*

- **Technical Users:** *(if internal tool)*
  - *"As a [team/role], I need [capability] to [achieve goal]."*

- **Pain Points:**
  - [ ] ...

---
#### **4. Technical Details**
- **Scope:**
  - Components/systems affected

  - High-level architecture impact

- **Dependencies:**
  - Other teams/services

  - External APIs/data sources

- **Constraints:**
  - Security/compliance requirements

  - Performance/SLA expectations

- **Risks:**
  - [ ] ...
  - [ ] ...

---
#### **5. Timeline**


---
#### **6. Implementation Notes**
- **Proposed Solution:** *(high-level approach, not prescriptive)*
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - [ ]
  - [ ]
- **Open Questions:**
  - [ ]
- **References:**
  - Design docs, API specs, or related tickets
